title: calesiam ornifolium
intro: Calesiam ornifolium, also known as Bird's Eye, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Its leaves and flowers have been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and itching, and acting as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. Calesiam ornifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications like creams and ointments.
